    HelpCenterIngestionEvent¶

    Properties¶

    article¶
    article: HelpCenterArticle;
    channel¶
    channel: {
  capabilities: {
     async: boolean;
     attachments: boolean;
     audioInput: boolean;
     audioOutput: boolean;
     buttons: boolean;
     deliveryReceipts: boolean;
     files: boolean;
     html: boolean;
     images: boolean;
     markdown: boolean;
     privateReplies: boolean;
     publicReplies: boolean;
     quickReplies: boolean;
     readReceipts: boolean;
     realtime: boolean;
     richText: boolean;
     supportsHumanTransfer: boolean;
     templates: boolean;
     threaded: boolean;
     typingIndicator: boolean;
     voice: boolean;
     widgets: boolean;
  };
  channelId: string;
  externalConversationId?: string;
  externalMessageId?: string;
  externalThreadId?: string;
  externalUserId?: string;
  kind: string;
  locale?: string;
  metadata?: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodRecord<z.ZodString, z.ZodUnknown>>;
  provider?: string;
  timezone?: string;
};

    Type Aliases¶

    HelpCenterJsonPrimitive¶

    type HelpCenterJsonPrimitive = string | number | boolean | null;

    HelpCenterJsonValue¶

    type HelpCenterJsonValue =
  | HelpCenterJsonPrimitive
  | HelpCenterJsonObject
  | readonly HelpCenterJsonValue[];

    HelpCenterProviderExtensionValue¶

    type HelpCenterProviderExtensionValue = HelpCenterJsonValue | object | undefined;

    HelpCenterProviderPayload¶

    type HelpCenterProviderPayload = HelpCenterJsonObject | object;

    HelpCenterProviderQuery¶

    type HelpCenterProviderQuery = Record<string, HelpCenterProviderExtensionValue>;

    HelpCenterSource¶

    type HelpCenterSource =
  | LocalHelpCenterSource
  | HttpHelpCenterSource;

    Parameter Type
    source HelpCenterSource

    Returns¶

    HelpCenterSource

    helpCenterCredentialStatuses()¶

    function helpCenterCredentialStatuses(input): {
  expiresAt?: string;
  message?: string;
  providerPackageId?: string;
  requirementId: string;
  scopes?: string[];
  state:   | "required"
     | "configured"
     | "permission-blocked"
     | "not-required"
     | "missing"
     | "expired"
     | "insufficient-scope"
     | "unavailable";
}[];

    Parameters¶

    Parameter Type
    input HelpCenterCredentialStatusInput

    Returns¶

    { expiresAt?: string; message?: string; providerPackageId?: string; requirementId: string; scopes?: string[]; state: | "required" | "configured" | "permission-blocked" | "not-required" | "missing" | "expired" | "insufficient-scope" | "unavailable"; }[]

    input.occurredAt? string
    input.sourceId string

    Returns¶

    HelpCenterIngestionEvent

    input.result HelpCenterSearchResult

    input.secret string
